mapper.select: select id, user_id, order_id, purchase_quantity, order_quantity, commodity_id, is_deleted, create_user, update_user, create_time, update_time from order_commodity where id = #{id} and is_deleted = 0
select commodity_id as commodityId, sum(purchase_quantity) as num from order_commodity where order_id = #{orderId} and is_deleted = 0

select id, user_id, order_id, purchase_quantity, order_quantity, commodity_id, is_deleted, create_user, update_user, create_time, update_time from order_commodity where order_id = #{orderId} and is_deleted = 0
mapper.insert: insert into order_commodity(id,user_id, order_id, purchase_quantity, order_quantity, commodity_id, is_deleted, create_user, update_user, create_time, update_time) values (#{id},#{userId}, #{orderId}, #{purchaseQuantity}, #{orderQuantity}, #{commodityId}, #{isDeleted}, #{createUser}, #{updateUser}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})

insert into order_commodity(id,user_id, order_id, purchase_quantity, order_quantity, commodity_id, is_deleted, create_user, update_user, create_time, update_time) values
(#{entity.id},#{entity.userId}, #{entity.orderId}, #{entity.purchaseQuantity}, #{entity.orderQuantity}, #{entity.commodityId}, #{entity.isDeleted}, #{entity.createUser}, #{entity.updateUser}, #{entity.createTime}, #{entity.updateTime})

insert into order_commodity(id,user_id, order_id, purchase_quantity, order_quantity, commodity_id, is_deleted, create_user, update_user, create_time, update_time) values
(#{entity.id},#{entity.userId}, #{entity.orderId}, #{entity.purchaseQuantity}, #{entity.orderQuantity}, #{entity.commodityId}, #{entity.isDeleted}, #{entity.createUser}, #{entity.updateUser}, #{entity.createTime}, #{entity.updateTime})
on duplicate key update user_id = values(user_id), order_id = values(order_id), purchase_quantity = values(purchase_quantity), order_quantity = values(order_quantity), commodity_id = values(commodity_id), is_deleted = values(is_deleted), create_user = values(create_user), update_user = values(update_user), create_time = values(create_time), update_time = values(update_time)
